title: Vežba 121

answers.answer: They might has missed the deadline because of a system error.
answers.feedback: Obrazac je might have, već nije might has.

answers.answer: They might missed the deadline due to a system error.
answers.feedback: Sledeći glagol might treba biti osnovna forma glagola.

answers.answer: They might have missed the deadline because of a system error.
They might had missed the deadline if they weren't reminded.
answers.feedback: Nakon might, koristimo have, a ne had.

instructions: Vežba nema zvuk. Pročitajte pitanje ispod i izaberite tačan odgovor.
explanation:
Modalni glagol might prati ga have + Past Participle da pokaže mogućnost koja je bila u prošlosti. Ova struktura se koristi kada ne znate da li se nešto dogodilo, ali mislite da je to bilo moguće.

  • Tačno: They might have missed the deadline.

  • Nije tačno: They might has missed..., They might missed..., au They might had missed...
